title: Illage Overspillage
description: A retexture pack for Illage and Spillage (Portage) mod
body:
# 📃Description
This is a resource pack that retextured the items from [Illage and Spillage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage) / [Illage and Portage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage-finally-ported) mod.

---

<center>

**↓↓↓ Permissions granted since the original project is ARR ↓↓↓**
